instructions: Replace null only through owner-reviewed evidence. Record public-safe references/timestamps, never credentials, token values, private keys, or private operational data.

external_acceptance_criteria.requirement: All credentials usable by legacy agents or schedulers are revoked.
Every known installed legacy edge/forge process is stopped and removed from startup.
External cron, Actions copies, service timers, and other schedulers are disabled.
Repository Issues writes are disabled/restricted or the repository is archived, and legacy telemetry is drained or closed under owner policy.
Description, homepage, topics, and other repository metadata no longer advertise a live wire.
Known mirrors and public CDN/head advertisements are retired.
Cached mutable head responses are invalidated where supported, with expiry recorded elsewhere.
The owner names the reviewed replacement path, or explicitly records consumer removal.
Every known consumer is migrated or removed and the result is acceptance-tested.
The owner records final acceptance only after EXT-01 through EXT-09 are satisfied.

tests: pinned baseline commit and independent immutable blob/byte/manifest comparison
exact tracked-path classification and unclassified-addition rejection
mutable net/latest.json absent now but preserved at the baseline ref
legacy Python and workflow entry points fail closed
all owner/external inputs are null and cannot yield acceptance
